violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (tomato slicer and soda dispenser knobs) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC informed and washed/sanitized tomato slicer. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025

Sliced tomatoes were observed over stacked in the cold hold wells. The top tomatoes temped at 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC removed the top stack of tomatoes and placed in walk-in. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the cart, tomato slicer, soda machine, cabinet (internal) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025

Inspector observed ceiling vents with dust buildup in the dining area and the floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025

Sliced tomatoes were observed held at 45- 51 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC moved to freezer. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024
Walk-in freezer door gaskets were observed torn and in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in freezer has an accumulation of frost buildup. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2024
One hand-washing sink in the kitchen/service area was lacking hand soap. Staff member was sent out to get soap during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2023
Handwashing sinks were lacking appropriate signage. New Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2023
Toilet in one of the restrooms was in need of cleaning. Staff cleaned restroom during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2023
The gaskets on the walk-in freezer are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/13/2023
